_description: Dataset config template for GR00T-CL v2 training
_notes: cameras: list of observation.images.* keys to keep. Others are filtered out.
If cameras is empty [], all cameras from the dataset are used.
task_prompts: maps task name to text instruction.
- Standard LeRobot format: tasks.parquet has 'task' column → auto-read, no need to set here.
- Non-standard format (e.g. INSIGHTfixposV3): scene_name index, task_index column → set here.
If task_prompts is empty {}, defaults to 'Perform the task.' for all tasks.
